name: Baichuan2-13B
license: Apache-2.0 (code) + Baichuan2 Community License for weights (free commercial use if DAU<1M, non-cloud-provider, no sublicensing)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer with ALiBi positional bias, 40 layers
note: Flagship of the Baichuan 2 open bilingual (zh/en) series, trained on 2.6T tokens with ALiBi attention; released as Base+Chat+4bit with a full technical report.
